input_text: Request a normal change to increase the checkout database connection pool on 2026-06-17 from 02:00 UTC to 03:00 UTC. Requested by Taylor Morgan from SRE. Medium risk with rollback to restore the old value. Approval is pending.

expected_output.title: Increase checkout database connection pool
expected_output.rollback_plan: Restore the previous checkout database connection pool value.
expected_output.business_justification: Increasing the connection pool should reduce checkout saturation and improve reliability.

input_text: Emergency change needed for payments routing on 2026-06-16 from 22:00 UTC to 22:30 UTC because production traffic is failing. Requested by Priya Shah from Payments. Critical risk and rollback is to revert the routing rule. Approval approved.

expected_output.title: Emergency payments routing change
expected_output.rollback_plan: Revert the payments routing rule to the previous production configuration.
expected_output.business_justification: Production payments traffic is failing and routing must be corrected immediately.

input_text: Standard change to rotate search service feature flags on 2026-06-18 from 01:00 UTC to 01:20 UTC. Requested by Marcus Lee from Search. Low risk with rollback by restoring previous flags. Approval approved.

expected_output.title: Rotate search service feature flags
expected_output.rollback_plan: Restore the previous search service feature flag values.
expected_output.business_justification: Rotating feature flags keeps the search rollout configuration current.

input_text: Normal change to upgrade authentication callback timeout settings on 2026-06-19 from 04:00 UTC to 05:00 UTC. Requested by Jordan Kim from Identity. High risk because login flow may be affected. Approval pending.

expected_output.title: Upgrade authentication callback timeout settings
expected_output.rollback_plan: Restore the previous authentication callback timeout settings.
expected_output.business_justification: Timeout tuning is needed to reduce callback failures while preserving login stability.

input_text: Emergency change to disable the checkout recommendation widget on 2026-06-16 from 21:15 UTC to 21:45 UTC. Requested by Alex Rivera from Web Platform. High risk. Rollback by re-enabling the widget flag. Approval approved.

expected_output.title: Disable checkout recommendation widget
expected_output.rollback_plan: Re-enable the checkout recommendation widget feature flag.
expected_output.business_justification: Disabling the widget mitigates checkout instability during the incident.

input_text: Standard change to update analytics retention policy on 2026-06-20 from 06:00 UTC to 06:30 UTC. Requested by Nina Patel from Data Platform. Low risk. Rollback by restoring previous retention settings. Approval pending.

expected_output.title: Update analytics retention policy
expected_output.rollback_plan: Restore the previous analytics retention policy settings.
expected_output.business_justification: The retention update aligns analytics storage with current policy requirements.

input_text: Normal change to migrate notification queue workers on 2026-06-21 from 03:00 UTC to 04:30 UTC. Requested by Omar Chen from Messaging. Medium risk. Rollback by returning traffic to the old worker group. Approval pending.

expected_output.title: Migrate notification queue workers
expected_output.rollback_plan: Return notification traffic to the old worker group.
expected_output.business_justification: Worker migration improves notification queue capacity and reliability.

input_text: Emergency change to block malformed API tokens at the gateway on 2026-06-16 from 23:00 UTC to 23:20 UTC. Requested by Samira Noor from Security. Critical risk. Rollback by removing the gateway rule. Approval approved.

expected_output.title: Block malformed API tokens at gateway
expected_output.rollback_plan: Remove the malformed token blocking rule from the gateway.
expected_output.business_justification: Blocking malformed tokens mitigates active gateway abuse.

input_text: Normal change to upgrade billing service container image on 2026-06-22 from 02:00 UTC to 03:00 UTC. Requested by Daniel Cho from Billing. Medium risk. Rollback by redeploying the previous image. Approval rejected.

expected_output.title: Upgrade billing service container image
expected_output.rollback_plan: Redeploy the previous billing service container image.
expected_output.business_justification: The billing image upgrade would apply runtime fixes, but approval was rejected.

input_text: Standard change to refresh CDN cache rules on 2026-06-23 from 05:00 UTC to 05:15 UTC. Requested by Emma Stone from Edge Platform. Low risk. Rollback by restoring the previous CDN rule set. Approval approved.

expected_output.title: Refresh CDN cache rules
expected_output.rollback_plan: Restore the previous CDN cache rule set.
expected_output.business_justification: Refreshing CDN cache rules keeps edge behavior aligned with current routing policy.
